highlights.text: Canggu VIP beach club & boutique shopping tour
Uluwatu cliffs, Tanah Lot & Tegalalang Bali Swing
Luxury flower bath & floating villa breakfast
Serial ID-006 | Category: Female Only / Girls Escape

itinerary.title: Bali Girls Escape
itinerary.overview: An ultra-luxury journey exclusively arranged by TRAGUIN for discerning all-female travel collectives. This tropical retreat balances chic beach clubs, premium boutique shopping, dramatic cliffside sunsets, and soulful rainforest wellness across Seminyak and Ubud. Ideal for bachelorette parties and friends' getaways.
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Bali girls escape (ID-006): Seminyak, Canggu beach clubs, Uluwatu, Tanah Lot, Ubud rice terraces, and luxury flower bath.

highlights.text: Canggu VIP Beach Club Daybed Access

days.title: Arrival in Bali — Elite Welcome to Seminyak
days.description: VIP airport meet & greet with flower garlands. Private luxury transfer to your handpicked hotel or pool villa in Seminyak. Welcome sunset cocktail at a premier beachfront lounge.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport meet & greet, private luxury transfer
Evening Experience: Welcome sunset cocktail at oceanfront lounge
Overnight Stay: Seminyak (Premium Luxury Resort / Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Welcome refreshments & curated welcome dinner

days.title: Canggu Lifestyle — Boutique Shopping & VIP Beach Club
days.description: Guided shopping tour through Canggu's premium boutiques and designer shops. Pre-booked VIP oceanfront cabana at a world-famous beach club.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Canggu guided shopping tour, VIP beach club daybed access
Overnight Stay: Seminyak (Premium Luxury Resort / Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Breakfast & VIP beach club lunch platter

days.title: Uluwatu Cliffside Majesty & Sunset Dining
days.description: Visit Uluwatu Temple perched 70 meters above the Indian Ocean. Candlelit fine dining at an exclusive cliff-edge restaurant with live acoustic music.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Uluwatu cliff temple, guided coastal panoramic tour
Evening Experience: Luxury seafood sunset dinner at cliff-edge restaurant
Overnight Stay: Seminyak (Premium Luxury Resort / Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Breakfast & luxury seafood sunset dinner

days.title: Tanah Lot & Journey to Ubud Rainforest
days.description: Visit Tanah Lot Temple en route to Ubud. Check into ultra-luxury rainforest resort with pre-arranged Balinese flower-petal bath in your villa.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Tanah Lot temple, scenic Ubud interior transfer
Evening Experience: Organic farm-to-table dinner under the stars
Overnight Stay: Ubud (Ultra-Luxury Rainforest Resort Villa)
Meals Included: Breakfast & Balinese luxury fusion dinner

days.title: Tegalalang Rice Terraces & Private Bali Swing
days.description: Morning at Tegalalang Rice Terraces with private VIP Bali Swing access. Hidden jungle waterfall and Ubud artisan market. Grand TRAGUIN signature celebration dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Tegalalang terraces, private Bali Swing, hidden waterfall, artisan market
Evening Experience: Grand farewell celebration feast
Overnight Stay: Ubud (Ultra-Luxury Rainforest Resort Villa)
Meals Included: Signature floating villa breakfast & premium farewell dinner

days.title: Soulful Farewell
days.description: Floating breakfast in your private villa infinity pool. Private luxury transfer to Ngurah Rai International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport departure transfer
Meals Included: Premium floating or buffet resort breakfast

hotels.name: Wina Holiday Villa Kuta / Seminyak / similar
Sthala, a Tribute Portfolio Hotel, Ubud / similar
Hotel Indigo Bali Seminyak Beach / similar
The Kayon Jungle Resort by Pramana

inclusions.text: 05 Nights at premium handpicked hotels or private pool villas
Dedicated private luxury MPV with English-speaking chauffeur
5 breakfasts (including 1 signature floating villa breakfast) and 3 specialty dinners
Pre-booked premium entry and daybed access at Canggu elite beach club
Complimentary iconic Balinese luxury flower bath arrangement per guest
Private entry tickets and unlimited swings at premier Bali Swing location
Indonesia Visa on Arrival and customs declaration fees
Extra food, premium alcoholic beverages, laundry, and shopping
